title: WordPress theme update breaks homepage layout
body: After updating to Twenty Twenty-Five child theme v1.2, the homepage hero section collapsed. Need to review CSS overrides in the child theme stylesheet.

title: Contact Form 7 plugin not sending email notifications
body: Contact Form 7 submissions are not triggering email notifications to secretary@shilohbaptistbiloxi.org. Likely an SMTP configuration issue with WP Mail SMTP plugin.

title: Migrate sermon archive from WordPress posts to Webflow CMS
body: Planning task: export sermon posts from WordPress and import into Webflow CMS collection. Need to map custom fields (date, pastor, scripture reference, audio URL).

title: Set up Webflow project for redesign
body: Initialize Webflow project for shilohbaptistbiloxi.org redesign. Set up CMS collections: Sermons, Events, Staff, Blog Posts. Configure custom domain and SSL.

title: Online giving page - Stripe integration
body: Integrate Stripe Checkout on the /give page. Support three giving categories: Tithes & Offerings, Building Fund, Missions. Must send receipt confirmation email. Need to verify church 501(c)(3) with Stripe.

title: Mobile layout broken on iOS 17 - nav menu overlap
body: On iPhone running iOS 17, the sticky navigation bar overlaps the page title on inner pages. The z-index stacking context needs to be corrected in the Webflow project.

title: SSL certificate renewal for legacy subdomain
body: The legacy.shilohbaptistbiloxi.org subdomain SSL cert expires 2027-01-14. Auto-renewal via Certbot must be verified. Cron job on shiloh-web-01 needs to be checked.

title: Accessibility audit - missing alt text on gallery images
body: WCAG 2.1 AA compliance: the Photo Gallery page has approximately 45 images without alt text. Need to add descriptive alt attributes to all images in the Webflow CMS gallery collection.

title: WordPress plugin updates - November 2026
body: Pending plugin updates: WP Mail SMTP 4.1.2, Yoast SEO 23.4, WP Super Cache 1.12.1, Wordfence 8.0.2, Contact Form 7 5.9.8. Test on staging before applying to production.

title: Webflow homepage hero redesign
body: Redesign the homepage hero section in Webflow to feature the new church banner image from the October 2026 outdoor service. Include updated tagline: 'Welcome Home to Shiloh'. Review with Pastor Wilkins before publish.

title: Events calendar plugin - update for 2026 schedule
body: Update The Events Calendar plugin with the following 2026 events: VBS (June 22-26), Church Picnic (July 4), Back-to-School Prayer (August 17), Fall Revival (September 14-17), Homecoming (October 11), Thanksgiving Dinner (November 26), Christmas Cantata (December 13).

title: Add weekly bulletin PDF upload system
body: Create a system for uploading the weekly bulletin PDF to the website. Options: Webflow CMS with file field, or WordPress Media Library with a shortcode on a static page. Gloria Tate to manage uploads each Friday.

title: Prayer request form not delivering submissions
body: The prayer request form on the /prayer page is not forwarding submissions to pastor@shilohbaptistbiloxi.org. Investigate Webflow form notifications and test SMTP relay settings.

title: Staff directory page - add new associate pastor bio
body: Add Reverend Darnell Hooks (Associate Pastor, joined March 2026) to the /staff page. Need headshot photo and bio text from church office. Assign to Calvin.

title: Google PageSpeed score below 70 on mobile
body: Google PageSpeed Insights rates the homepage at 58/100 mobile. Main offenders: unoptimized hero image (2.1MB JPEG), render-blocking embed scripts, and a 420KB Google Font payload. Needs WebP conversion and font-display:swap.

title: Volunteer signup form for VBS 2026
body: Create a Webflow form at /vbs-volunteers for VBS 2026 volunteer registration. Fields: name, email, phone, age group preference, dietary restrictions, returning volunteer checkbox. Route submissions to vbs@shilohbaptistbiloxi.org.

title: WordPress core update to 6.7
body: WordPress 6.7 is available. Test on staging environment first. Backup database before applying. Check theme compatibility with Gutenberg block changes in 6.7.

title: Social media feed embed on homepage
body: Add a Facebook/Instagram feed widget on the homepage to display recent church social posts. Evaluate Smash Balloon plugin for WordPress or a custom Webflow embed. Must work on mobile.

title: Children ministry page - update curriculum info
body: Update the /childrens-ministry page with the 2026 curriculum: Kingdom Kids for ages 3-5, Roots & Wings for ages 6-10. New teacher roster for Sunday School and Wednesday night. Gloria Tate to provide copy.

title: Church history page content review
body: The /history page copy was last updated in 2022. Pastor Wilkins has provided revised text covering the church's 75th anniversary milestones. Upload new text and the anniversary photo collage (provided as ZIP by church secretary).
